description.ko: 백색광 한 줄기가 정교하게 가공된 유리를 통과하며 생동감 넘치는 스펙트럼으로 변하는 빛의 물리학을 시각적으로 구현한 작품입니다.
description.en: A stunning visual study of light physics, showcasing how a single beam of white light transforms into a vibrant spectrum as it passes through precision-cut glass.

prompt: Macro photography of a complex geometric glass sculpture, a powerful beam of light hitting the edge, creating intricate light refraction and caustic patterns. Vivid rainbow spectrums dispersing across a minimalist dark gray background. High-speed shutter, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, sharp focus on the glass edges and the separation of colors.
